name: Illinois Monetary Award Program (MAP)

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or eligible non-citizen; IL resident
eligibility.other_requirements: IL resident attending eligible IL postsecondary institution; demonstrated financial need; early FAFSA filing is critical due to first-come-first-served funding

deadline: As soon as possible after Oct 1 FAFSA opening (funding runs out)
stackable_notes: State grant; stacks with federal Pell Grant. MAP is first-come-first-served and frequently runs out mid-year — file FAFSA immediately when available.
notes: MAP is NOT guaranteed — funding is limited and exhausted mid-year frequently. File FAFSA as soon as possible after October 1. Students at private IL colleges can receive higher MAP amounts than at public institutions.
